name: Bourbon Chicken3
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chicken thigh, skinless, boneless, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a shallow pan and spread it out in a single layer.
2. Mix together the soy sauce, bourbon, garlic, ginger, olive oil, and brown sugar to create the marinade.
3. Pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring all pieces are well coated.
4. Refrigerate the marinated chicken for at least 30 minutes or up to several hours for best flavor.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Transfer the marinated chicken to a baking dish and bake for 45 minutes, or until fully cooked and no longer pink in the center.
7. The chicken can also be grilled or broiled if preferred, following similar cooking times.
